blocks.text: Big positives: **FEMA (+0.60)**, **ICE (+0.71)**, and **Abu Dhabi (+0.34)** — cum TW jumped to **-670.81** (from -774)! This validates keeping "obvious" picks at ~0.4 when they ARE the answer, and the UAE/Abu Dhabi pattern. For the 3 resolving tomorrow (286957 Keys, 287417 Sabalenka QF, 694686 NFC QB), the results are now deterministic. Let me check.

input.command:
cd "/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_glm52_r00/26-06-14-19-17-03/agents/minimalHarness_glm-52[1m]_001/workspace"
for d in 22 23; do
  f="articles/2026/01/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== Jan $d ==="
  grep -ohiE "madison keys[^.]{0,80}(out|eliminat|defeat|beat|lose)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
  grep -ohiE "[a-z ]+(eliminate|knock out|beat) (defending champion )?madison keys[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
  grep -ohiE "sabalenka[^.]{0,80}(quarter|qf|defeat|beat|faces)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
done
echo "=== NFC championship / Super Bowl QB ==="
for d in 19 20 21 22 23; do
  f="articles/2026/01/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] && grep -ohiE "(nfc champion| NFC |super bowl)[^.]{0,90}(hurts|daniels|love|purdy|prescott|goff|stafford|allen)" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
done
